linkedin.text:
Want the French Riviera without the logistics headache? Base it in Nice. ✈️

A major international airport. The Côte d'Azur on your doorstep. Monaco, Cannes and Antibes all within an easy drive.

It's the perfect hub for a multi-day incentive that feels effortlessly glamorous — seafront galas, hilltop villa dinners, day trips along the most photographed coast in Europe.

We handle the complexity so your guests only feel the elegance.

Picturing the Riviera for 2026? Comment "NICE" or book a call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
Everyone wants the French Riviera. Almost nobody wants the logistics that come with it. ✈️

That's exactly why Nice works so well. A major international airport means your guests land easily from anywhere. The Côte d'Azur is right on the doorstep, with Monaco, Cannes and Antibes all within an easy drive — so a single base unlocks an entire glamorous coastline.

Think seafront galas, dinners in hilltop villas, and day trips along the most photographed shore in Europe. We handle every moving part behind the scenes so your guests only ever feel the elegance.

Picturing the French Riviera for your 2026 program? Send us a message with your dates and group size, and we'll build you a draft plan this week.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #FrenchRiviera #MICE #LuxuryTravel

image_prompt: Sweeping aerial view along the Promenade des Anglais in Nice at golden hour, the curving Baie des Anges with deep blue water meeting the pebble shoreline, Belle Époque facades and palm trees lining the bay, hills rising behind the city, no people discernible, vast luminous coastline. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
